name: Stouffer's Corn Soufflé
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs until foamy.
3. Gradually add remaining ingredients (cornstarch, sugar, salt, pepper, nutmeg, corn, sour cream, and milk) while continuously beating with an electric mixer.
4. Pour the mixture into a Pam-sprayed 8-inch square baking dish.
5. Bake on the center rack of the preheated oven for 35 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
